name: Mini Meat Loaves
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs lean ground meat loaf mix (beef and pork)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rack in the upper third of the oven. Heat the oven to 475°F.
2. Line a jelly-roll pan with foil and coat with cooking spray.
3. Combine tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, eggs, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
4. Add ground meat and bread crumbs, stirring until just combined.
5. Divide the mixture into 8 equal pieces and shape into mini-loaves.
6. Place the loaves on the prepared pan.
7. Bake in the upper third of the oven at 475°F for 15 minutes.
8. Spread ketchup over the top of the loaves.
9. Continue baking for 5 more minutes or until juices run clear and the internal temperature reaches 180°F on an instant-read thermometer.
